slides.title: Court Jester
slides.body: When ELIAS is pulled into a tense situation he does not fully understand, he must navigate mounting pressure before everything collapses.

slides.title: Logline
slides.body: When ELIAS is pulled into a tense situation he does not fully understand, he must navigate mounting pressure before everything collapses.

slides.title: Synopsis
slides.body: As pressure mounts around ELIAS, incomplete information and rising tension force increasingly risky choices. What first appears to be one kind of threat gradually reveals itself to be something more complicated, pushing the story toward a reversal that challenges the protagonist's assumptions.

slides.title: Hook
slides.body: When ELIAS is pulled into a tense situation he does not fully understand, he must navigate mounting pressure before everything collapses.

slides.title: Conflict
slides.body: Elias must navigate ridiculous power structures, inflated egos, and escalating chaos without losing the part of themselves that makes them dangerous.

slides.title: Stakes
slides.body: Elias must navigate ridiculous power structures, inflated egos, and escalating chaos without losing the part of themselves that makes them dangerous.

slides.title: Story Engine
slides.body: Elias stumbles into a role far bigger than expected, and each attempt to survive the absurd rules of the kingdom only pulls the chaos closer.

slides.title: Reversal
slides.body: The truth behind the situation is different from what the protagonist first assumes.

slides.title: Why This Movie
slides.body: Elias stumbles into a role far bigger than expected, and each attempt to survive the absurd rules of the kingdom only pulls the chaos closer.
